form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind Fascinate Suzie at this track last start over 515m (30.17). Gets back so might need a bit of luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels in the back straight and shifted wide as a result.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 400m. Last start finished 2nd on April 10 over 515m at this track behind Cousin Sal beaten 0.8 lengths (29.85) in a Grade 4/5. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 5 lengths behind Pirate Riot over 515m. Capable of taking this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels rounding the first turn.
Came together on the run to the first turn and was checked.

form.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (17.70) over 300m at Taree Super Track. Has to overcome a wide draw and looks safely held.
